alignments.json_text: Honestly, I don't know if you'll buy this, but I think it's really kind of inherent in putting out a CD.
alignments.wiki_text: Honestly, I don’t know if—if you’ll buy this, but I think it’s really kind of inherent in putting out a CD. Like back when I made cassettes all the time, there was so little… like, delineation between one thing and another thing. It just kind of all bled into the next thing to where it was hard to even pinpoint where something happened. But with CDs and stuff you really have to, um… find… the beginning and the end and…Yeah, if it sounds good, I’m gonna go for it, I’m gonna include it. I guess it has gotten a little more long-form, to answer your question. So, yeah, things have gotten a lot more long-form, now that I think about.There used to be just, like… 50 or 60, ya know, 3-second, 5-second, 10-second things and, uh… that’s kind of gone out a little bit with the digital stuff.
